_note: Pentamachine Solo. Confirmed as a real Pentamachine product from the v5.8.4 disk image — GLB model /opt/penta-ui-builds/gltf/solo.glb (7.9 MB) ships on the controller. Board revision key is unknown until we see a Solo-specific ini template in Settings. For now, Pentacad treats it as a separate machine class and emits a generic Pentamachine V2 .ngc dialect.
description: Pentamachine Solo — newer SKU. Exact kinematics + rotary-axis presence to be confirmed. Disk image + Kinetic Control code treat Solo as a distinct machine class (separate probing routines, separate GLB model, separate feature set).

linux_cnc._note: Solo-specific version directory not present in PocketNC/Settings master as of 2026-04-24. May be in a private fork Pentamachine ships on the machine itself.

rotary._note: Solo may or may not have A/B axes. Disk image mentions 'door' + 'beta_solo_door' features, suggesting an enclosure with interlocked door, but nothing explicitly rules out 5-axis kinematics. Confirm before production.

viewer._note: Largest GLB of the family — Solo model is more detailed than V1/V2.

singularity_notes: Solo door interlock — Pentacad `coolant({flood:true})` may be blocked by the interlock in certain door states. Check `interlock` status before commanding coolant.

door_interlock._note: Solo has an interlocked door — see Settings/features/interlock/ for behaviour.
